query: SELECT section, COUNT(*) AS total_rows, MAX(populated_at) AS latest FROM debt_target_cache GROUP BY section;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zL6E4esQEHiYzS.root --database WPSwtnWiTSyEVhTdqqAYk7 --execute SELECT section, COUNT(*) AS total_rows, MAX(populated_at) AS latest FROM debt_target_cache GROUP BY section;
